message:
Fix design consistency and add missing logging/tests

## Design Consistency Fixes:
- bd-10i.7: Defined RenderContext to include RenderBudget
  (unified Widget trait signature across all widgets)
- bd-128s: Updated to use RenderContext pattern

## Missing Logging Added:
- bd-3t87: Added scroll, eviction, and render stats logging
- bd-2lwf: Added recording, seek, and export logging

## Thread Safety:
- bd-2lwf: Added note about RwLock poisoning handling

## Test Improvements:
- bd-uo6v: Added property tests for virtualization invariants

All features now have:
- Consistent API design via RenderContext
- Comprehensive logging at appropriate levels
- Thread safety considerations documented
- Property tests for invariant checking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
